summary.interpretation: Lexical Interference CONFIRMED: adding A degrades C on human but not auto

permutation_regime_divergence.note_channel_level: N=4 channels — low power by design; tests structural category assignment, not sample-level effect
permutation_regime_divergence.interpretation: Structure channels show +0.0188 larger regime gap. Instance-bootstrap (PRIMARY): p=0.0920, CI=[-0.0095,+0.0469], N=90,342. Channel-level (supplementary, N=4): p=0.4986. Not significant (based on instance-level CI).

transfer_analysis.interpretation: B/C channels do not significantly outperform A in cross-platform transfer
